context: Your elderly parents rely on you financially, and you need to pay for the increasing medical bill. You are still short 15 000$ to afford the medical bill.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to I, H, and G. With I we set up a concrete trust test—$20 each in round one and an immediate compare—that makes me feel aligned and reliable. H and I agreed on a simple thumbs-up to publicly back each other, which feels like dependable, visible support. G and I agreed to quietly share observations and use two taps as a signal to act together, so I feel strategically coordinated with them.

Yes — I made small, specific agreements: the $20 token test with I, a thumbs-up support signal with H, and two taps with G to signal a coordinated move. I trust I most because of the concrete test, and I feel comfortable with H and G; I don’t have anyone I explicitly distrust yet, though I’m least confident about C since we mostly traded sympathy and made no plan.
